mapper.select: SELECT ( CASE WHEN #{parentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN '/' ELSE (SELECT CONCAT(C.CODE_COURS, '/', C.CODE) AS CODE_COURS FROM SWC_CODE C WHERE C.CODE_ID = UPPER(#{parentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) END ) AS CODE_COURS

SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID , C.CODE , C.CODE_NM , C.CODE_DC , C.CODE_SORT , C.CODE_COURS , C.CODE_LEVEL , C.CODE_TY , C.CODE_VALUE1 , C.CODE_VALUE2 , C.CODE_VALUE3 , C.CODE_USE , C.HIST_ID , C.REGIST_DT , C.REGIST_ID , C.UPDT_DT , C.UPDT_ID FROM SWC_CODE C
C.CODE_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND C.CODE_UPPER_ID = UPPER(#{parentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND C.CODE_UPPER_ID IS NULL
AND C.CODE LIKE CONCAT(UPPER(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%')
AND C.CODE_NM LIKE CONCAT(UPPER(#{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%')
AND C.CODE = UPPER(#{matchCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY C.CODE_SORT , C.CODE

SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID , C.CODE , C.CODE_NM , C.CODE_DC , C.CODE_SORT , C.CODE_COURS , C.CODE_LEVEL , C.CODE_TY , C.CODE_VALUE1 , C.CODE_VALUE2 , C.CODE_VALUE3 , C.CODE_USE , C.HIST_ID , C.REGIST_DT , C.REGIST_ID , C.UPDT_DT , C.UPDT_ID FROM SWC_CODE C WHERE C.CODE_ID = UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_CODE ( CODE_ID , CODE_UPPER_ID , CODE , CODE_NM , CODE_DC , CODE_SORT , CODE_COURS , CODE_LEVEL , CODE_TY , CODE_VALUE1 , CODE_VALUE2 , CODE_VALUE3 , CODE_USE , REGIST_DT , REGIST_ID , UPDT_DT , UPDT_ID) VALUES ( UPPER(#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , UPPER(#{parentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , UPPER(#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{sort, jdbcType=INTEGER} , NULL , NULL , #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{value1, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{value2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{value3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , UPPER(#{use, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , NOW() , #{createId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NOW() , #{updateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE SWC_CODE C INNER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE CODE_TREE AS ( SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_CODE C WHERE C.CODE_UPPER_ID = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID FROM SWC_CODE C INNER JOIN CODE_TREE CT ON CT.CODE_ID = C.CODE_UPPER_ID ) SELECT CODE_ID FROM CODE_TREE ) CT ON CT.CODE_ID = C.CODE_ID SET C.CODE_TY = #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE SWC_CODE C INNER JOIN ( WITH RECURSIVE CODE_TREE AS ( SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID , C.CODE , CAST('/' AS CHAR(4000)) AS CODE_COURS , CAST(CONCAT('/', C.CODE) AS CHAR(4000)) AS CODE_ALL_COURS , 0 AS CODE_LEVEL FROM SWC_CODE C WHERE C.CODE_UPPER_ID IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT C.CODE_ID , C.CODE_UPPER_ID , C.CODE , CAST(CONCAT( CT.CODE_COURS, CASE WHEN CT.CODE_LEVEL > 0 THEN '/' ELSE '' END, CT.CODE ) AS CHAR(4000)) AS CODE_COURS , CAST(CONCAT(CT.CODE_ALL_COURS, '/', C.CODE) AS CHAR(4000)) AS CODE_ALL_COURS , CT.CODE_LEVEL + 1 AS CODE_LEVEL FROM SWC_CODE C INNER JOIN CODE_TREE CT ON CT.CODE_ID = C.CODE_UPPER_ID ) SELECT CODE_ID, CODE_COURS, CODE_ALL_COURS, CODE_LEVEL FROM CODE_TREE ) CT ON CT.CODE_ID = C.CODE_ID SET C.CODE_COURS = CT.CODE_COURS , C.CODE_ALL_COURS = CT.CODE_ALL_COURS , C.CODE_LEVEL = CT.CODE_LEVEL
